articles.title: Republicans Add Slate Of Anti-Trans Proposals To Controversial Voting Rights Bill
articles.content: Keep independent journalism alive. Republicans conceded late Tuesday evening, adding several amendments that target trans rights. The bill has little chance of actually becoming law. Democrats are unified in their opposition to it, and even many Republicans are skeptical
